title: Lakshmir Bhandar Expansion
desc: Increase monthly allowance for women beneficiaries and expand coverage to include more families.

title: Student Credit Card Limit Hike
desc: Raise the limit of the Student Credit Card scheme and simplify the loan approval process.

title: Swasthya Sathi 2.0
desc: Upgrade healthcare infrastructure and expand the list of empanelled hospitals for cashless treatment.

title: Krishak Bandhu Arrears & Bonus
desc: Immediate disbursement of pending dues and introduction of a seasonal bonus for farmers.

title: Pathashree 3.0
desc: Reconstruction and maintenance of 20,000 km of rural roads across all districts.

title: Silicon Valley Hub (Kolkata)
desc: Attract global tech giants to the New Town Silicon Valley project and create 5 lakh IT jobs.

title: Duare Sarkar Permanent Centers
desc: Convert periodic Duare Sarkar camps into permanent neighborhood service centers.

title: Free Tablets for Class 11 & 12
desc: Continuation and expansion of the Taruner Swapno scheme to all higher secondary students.
